intended_use: Bladder AI uses machine-learning techniques to aid in the quantification of bladder volume from ultrasound images. The device is intended to be used on images of patients aged two years or older.
intended_use_full: Bladder AI uses machine-learning techniques to aid in the quantification of bladder volume from ultrasound images. The device is intended to be used on images of patients aged two years or older.
target_condition: Bladder volume assessment via ultrasound imaging
ground_truth: Average bladder volume measurement among three expert clinicians
other_metrics: Intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) for Dual-View: 0.98; ICC for Single-View: 0.97; Mean volume difference Dual-View: 2 mL (Limits of Agreement: -42 to 46 mL); Mean volume difference Single-View: 3 mL (Limits of Agreement: -49 to 55 mL)
